word: H6398 - פָּלַח - pâlach - paw-lakh' - Bring forth

sections.paragraph:
Original: פּלח

Transliteration: pâlach

Phonetic: paw-lakh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to cleave, slice
    1. (Qal) to cleave, plow
    2. (Piel)
      1. to cleave open or through
      2. to cause to cleave open
      3. to slice, pierce

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1773

Part(s) of speech: Verb
